achievements.description: GDCU-8869 Desktop PSI geo-redirect race condition DONE (Sanja Budic, High). Critical bug fixed: PSI desktop audits unblocked across 78+ URLs in all markets. Root cause was DOMContentLoaded firing before deferred scripts defined isGooglePageSpeedInsightsAgent(); fixed by switching to window.load event. Weekly CWV monitoring workflow restored.

GDCU-8862 Offer Terms Static/Scrollable logic DONE (Kelvin Yee). Bet365 compliance requirement met: scrollable T&Cs re-introduced across all UK operator lists with per-brand static exclusions for Bet365 and future non-compliant brands.

GDCU-8807 Dynamic Content API (Cloudflare Workers + D1 + GDC Admin Panel) DONE (Kelvin Yee). Mobile app hero text, carousel banners, casino offers and Cosmo Spins game link can now be updated server-side without app releases.

GDCU-8824 Cosmo Spins/Slot Tournament Bloomreach event tags DONE (Kelvin Yee). Events now fire when users exhaust Cosmo credits, enabling the CRM team to build web push notification workflows in Bloomreach.

GDCU-8840 Instagram Story-style Operator List NZ A/B test DONE (Novica Vukobratovic). Live on two NZ pages: No Deposit Free Spins and No Deposit Bonus Casinos. VWO test #243 is running. Stakeholders: Chloe Christie, Eoin McCarthy, Mike Pett, Gabriel Cornoiu, Vic Dadson, Joshua Smith.

GDCU-8863 Incorrect KTag CT value fixed across 40+ gambling.com operator pages (Sanja Budic). oplistclk events now correctly fire as ct:cta on affected operator pages, restoring click tracking accuracy and downstream reporting integrity.
GDCU-8694 Image Carousel 500x290 size DONE (Jessica Dordevic). New size option now available to editors via the image carousel shortcode across all geos.

GDCU-8893 Gambling.com Design System (Ciara Carroll, Highest priority) moved In Progress → In Product — Ciara has submitted for Mike's review. Netlify deployment restriction flagged last Friday appears resolved.
GDCU-8546 Tinder Style Offer Match (Jessica Dordevic) moved In Progress → In Product — Jessica's designs ready for Mike's review.
GDCU-8870 Investigate Performance Improvements for Page Timeouts (Nebojsa Stanic) moved to In Product — new item ready for Mike's review.
GDCU-8801 Oplist Redesign on CA/FR Casino Page (Ciara Carroll) moved from stalled In Product back to In Progress — Ciara has re-engaged after 11 days without movement.

28th April 2026 GDC SMT Weekly meeting notes published in Confluence (author: Gabriel Cornoiu). Mike Pett is on the agenda presenting Claude Design, Design Consistency and Analytics. Meeting is tomorrow.

Victoria Dadson weekly activity report published — confirms two-week sick sign-off effective 21 April, expected return ~5 May 2026. Automated Looker Studio health checks non-functional in her absence. Pre-sprint tracking meeting (with Chloe Christie and Joshua Smith) has missed 3 consecutive sessions.

WK18 Release Plan published in Confluence (Releases Mon 27/Apr/2026 WK18). GDC items include Instagram Headers Widget, Offer Terms logic, Cosmo Spins event tags, and Dynamic Content API — all confirmed Done today.

meeting_summaries.title: No meetings confirmed for 27 April (calendar data unavailable)
meeting_summaries.summary: Microsoft 365 authentication was not completed as of Friday's morning report — calendar data remains unavailable today. No meetings for Monday 27 April were recorded in the morning report. No Slack activity was visible in any monitored channel today (gdc-pod, gdc-pdmt, gdc-product-design-pod, gdc-product-led-growth, core-product, gdc-f2p-apps, gdc-high-agency, 6amigos). The team's output is evidenced through Jira (7 tickets Done, multiple status changes) and Confluence updates.

action_points.action: URGENT — Review and sign off GDCU-8893 Gambling.com Design System (Ciara Carroll, Highest priority). Moved In Progress → In Product today — Ciara has submitted. Top Highest-priority sprint item; also feeds directly into Mike's Claude Design presentation at SMT tomorrow. Review today or first thing Tuesday.

CRITICAL CARRY FORWARD — GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign (Ciara Carroll) — Day 11 blocked In Product. No resolution over the weekend or today. Ciara is active (GDCU-8801 back In Progress today), making direct engagement now possible. Come to Tuesday morning with a concrete resolution or escalation path.

SMT PREP — Prepare talking points for tomorrow's GDC SMT Weekly. Mike is presenting: (1) Claude Design — tool assessment, design system URL (claude.ai/design/p/8e1abca0), workflow; (2) Design Consistency — examples of non-compliant components, CWV impact, ask for team leads to police quality; (3) Analytics — 91.3% mobile, bounce -4%, engagement +20%, organic social +14.1% WoW. Also prepare 3-5 use cases for the Product Automations Engineer role (requested by Gabriel).

NEW BLOCKER — Investigate GDCU-8788 Add Navigation Bar to Ace Assistant (Novica Vukobratovic) — appeared Blocked In QA today. Understand what is preventing QA sign-off and whether PM action is needed.

CARRY FORWARD — GDCU-8792 Cloudflare Bot Management (Sanja Budic) remains Blocked In QA. Sanja had an excellent day (GDCU-8869 and GDCU-8863 both Done). Good moment to follow up with Sanja on what is still blocking the Cloudflare QA sign-off.
Review and sign off GDCU-8546 Tinder Style Offer Match (Jessica Dordevic, Medium). Moved In Progress → In Product today. Jessica's designs ready for review.
Review and sign off GDCU-8870 Performance Improvements for Page Timeouts (Nebojsa Stanic, Medium). Moved to In Product today — first appearance in review queue.

CARRY FORWARD — Review and sign off GDCU-8512 Always On Betting Tips Page (Miguel Migneco, Medium). In Product since 23 April. Also listed as 'Coming Up' in tomorrow's SMT Weekly — Mike should be ready to give a release timeline.

CARRY FORWARD — Reply to Chloe Christie in Group DM (Mike / Chloe / Gab) re: stakeholder intake form. She asked to add a schema sub-section to the SEO field and a new page option with a dropdown for editable content blocks (2026-04-23 15:26 BST). No new Slack activity from Chloe today.

CARRY FORWARD — Reply to Gabriel Cornoiu in Group DM re: stakeholder intake form. Two open questions: (1) should there be an 'Other' option in the offer ordering dropdown? (2) does 'new ordering structure required' mean a new OpList? No new Slack activity from Gab today.

Victoria Dadson (direct report) on two-week sick sign-off from 21 April — expected return ~5 May. Actions: (1) arrange temporary cover or reschedule her recurring pre-sprint tracking meeting with Chloe Christie and Joshua Smith (3 consecutive sessions missed); (2) Looker Studio automated health checks need re-auth when she returns; (3) follow up on GDC Data Gaps meeting outcomes from 22 April that Victoria needs briefing on.

MONITORING — GDCU-8801 Oplist Redesign on CA/FR Casino Page (Ciara Carroll). Positive: moved from stalled In Product back to In Progress today. No immediate PM action; monitor for progression to In Product.
CARRY FORWARD — GDCU-8903 Sports Quiz Hub (Backlog). Create UX pre-requisite ticket or validate scope alignment with Chloe and Gab. No activity today.

calendar._note: Microsoft 365 authentication not completed — direct calendar lookup unavailable. Meeting details sourced from Confluence. Next working day: Tuesday 28 April 2026.

next_working_day.title: GDC SMT Weekly
next_working_day.synopsis: Weekly Senior Management Team meeting. Mike Pett is on the agenda presenting three items: Claude Design 10-day capability assessment, Design Consistency enforcement ask, and Analytics summary. Manager Colin Brannigan is present. Gabriel Cornoiu covers Cosmo Spins mobile app feedback request, this week's releases, items in progress, coming-up items, and the Product Automations Engineer interview ask.
discussion_topics: Claude Design: 10-day assessment, gambling.com design system (Ciara Carroll), optimal workflow (Claude Design ideation → Claude Code prototype → branch → designer 5%), lofi-to-prototype cycle time reduction. Mike and Miguel tested and compressed a multi-day project to ~one day.

Design Consistency: Genesis HTML embeds going live below minimum UX standards; direct Core Web Vitals score impact; Mike asking team leads to brief editors and enforce quality gates. Design system at claude.ai/design/p/8e1abca0 available.
Analytics: 91.3% mobile users, bounce -4% WoW, engagement +20% WoW, organic social +14.1% WoW (22,934 → 26,165 sessions) with stable 54% bounce.
Cosmo Spins mobile app: SMT asked to test, share polish and refinement feedback.
This week's releases: Instagram oplist A/B test (NZ, VWO #243), Genesis content layouts, scrollable/static T&C brand logic, Bloomreach Cosmo Spins event tags.
In progress: Genesis Brands Carousel component, Learning Hub (Carlos applying feedback), Bottom Nav A/B test (running since last Thursday), Viktor now supporting Iceland (dual-language).
Coming up: Always On Betting Tips page, SlotsLaunch Shortcode, Bloomreach push notifications + In-App Age Gate 18+ (mobile), Rev Share VIP oplist (AdTech).
Product Automations Engineer interview — team use cases requested by Gabriel Cornoiu.
next_working_day.prep_notes: Mike is presenting — active preparation needed. (1) Claude Design: have design system URL ready, articulate the workflow clearly, frame as 'weapon to add to armoury — not yet perfect'. (2) Design Consistency: prepare 2-3 concrete examples of non-compliant Genesis embed components; frame positively to avoid blocking high-agency culture; highlight CWV link. (3) Analytics: confirm 91.3% mobile, bounce -4%, engagement +20%, organic social +14.1% numbers — have them to hand. (4) Always On Betting Tips (GDCU-8512) listed as Coming Up — have a release timeline ready. (5) Draft 3-5 use cases for the Product Automations Engineer role before the meeting.
